title: Undiscovered Gems in Middle East Stocks for March 2026
content:
As geopolitical tensions continue to influence investor sentiment, Gulf markets have experienced a recent downturn, with key indices such as Dubai's main share index and Abu Dhabi's index seeing notable declines. Despite this cautious market environment, the search for undiscovered gems in the Middle East remains compelling for investors looking to navigate volatility with strategic insights. In times of uncertainty, identifying stocks that demonstrate resilience through strong fundamentals and potential for growth can be particularly rewarding.

Top 10 Undiscovered Gems With Strong Fundamentals In The Middle East

Name Debt To Equity Revenue Growth Earnings Growth Health Rating Al Wathba National Insurance Company PJSC 10.17% 12.24% -7.06% ★★★★★★ Baazeem Trading 10.02% -1.27% -1.66% ★★★★★★ Saudi Azm for Communication and Information Technology NA 17.87% 23.67% ★★★★★★ Nofoth Food Products NA 20.62% 23.75% ★★★★★★ MOBI Industry 13.81% 5.68% 19.85% ★★★★★★ Najran Cement 14.49% -4.20% -30.16% ★★★★★★ Alf Meem Yaa for Medical Supplies and Equipment 27.12% 12.68% 18.39% ★★★★★☆ Saudi Chemical Holding 47.39% 17.85% 39.66% ★★★★★☆ Segmen Kardesler Gida Üretim ve Ambalaj Sanayi Anonim Sirketi 0.97% 12.60% 61.63% ★★★★☆☆ Etihad GO Telecom NA 38.31% 54.97% ★★★★☆☆

Click here to see the full list of 213 stocks from our Middle Eastern Undiscovered Gems With Strong Fundamentals screener.

Underneath we present a selection of stocks filtered out by our screen.

Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. is a company engaged in the production and sale of roll papers both domestically in Turkey and internationally, with a market capitalization of TRY22.62 billion.

Operations: Lila Kagit generates revenue primarily from its Paper & Paper Products segment, amounting to TRY13.60 billion.

With its earnings growth of 10.8% surpassing the Household Products industry's 2%, Lila Kagit stands out in its sector. The company reported a net income of TRY 1,704 million for the year ending December 2025, up from TRY 1,538 million previously, showcasing robust profitability despite sales dipping to TRY 13.60 billion from TRY 16.39 billion. Its price-to-earnings ratio at 13x positions it attractively against the broader TR market's average of 18x. With more cash than total debt and strong free cash flow generation—TRY 4 billion in recent quarters—Lila Kagit seems well-poised for future growth prospects.

Take a closer look at Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret's potential here in our health report. Evaluate Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret's historical performance by accessing our past performance report.

Story Continues

IBSE:LILAK Debt to Equity as at Mar 2026

Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding A.S. is involved in investment activities in Turkey and has a market capitalization of TRY29.09 billion.

Operations: Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding generates revenue through its investment activities in Turkey. The company focuses on optimizing its cost structure to enhance profitability, with a significant emphasis on managing expenses related to its core operations.

Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding, a financial entity in the Middle East, has recently turned profitable, marking a significant milestone. The company is debt-free and does not face concerns over interest coverage. However, it experienced a notable one-off loss of TRY30.5M in the past year, impacting its financial results up to September 2025. Despite this setback, Tera's free cash flow remains positive with TRY111.42M reported as of June 2025. The share price has been highly volatile over the last three months but reflects potential for growth given its newfound profitability and industry context.

Click to explore a detailed breakdown of our findings in Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding's health report. Explore historical data to track Tera Finansal Yatirimlar Holding's performance over time in our Past section.IBSE:TRHOL Debt to Equity as at Mar 2026

East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry specializes in providing coating services for customer-supplied pipes and has a market capitalization of SAR4.73 billion.

Operations: East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry generates revenue primarily from its machinery segment, specifically pumps, amounting to SAR1.99 billion.

East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry is making waves with its robust growth and strategic expansions. Over the past five years, earnings have surged by 51.8% annually, showcasing strong performance despite not outpacing the broader Metals and Mining industry recently. The company's price-to-earnings ratio of 9.6x indicates good value compared to the SA market's 16.8x average, while a reduction in debt-to-equity from 55% to 2.4% over five years underscores financial prudence. Recent developments include a new production line boosting capacity by 100,000 metric tons and a SAR 60 million contract for steel pipe coating, signaling continued momentum in operational efficiency and market presence.

title: Middle Eastern Dividend Stocks To Consider In March 2026
content:
Amidst the backdrop of Gulf equities gaining traction following reports of a potential US-Iran ceasefire proposal, Middle Eastern markets are experiencing a wave of optimism that has buoyed indices across the region. In this environment, dividend stocks become particularly appealing as they offer investors not only potential capital appreciation but also regular income, making them an attractive option in times of market volatility and geopolitical uncertainty.

Top 10 Dividend Stocks In The Middle East

(DFM:NGI) 7.76% ★★★★★☆ National Bank of Ras Al-Khaimah (P.S.C.) (ADX:RAKBANK) 7.39% ★★★★★☆ Emirates Insurance Company P.J.S.C (ADX:EIC) 7.89% ★★★★★★ Emaar Properties PJSC (DFM:EMAAR) 7.84% ★★★★★☆ Computer Direct Group (TASE:CMDR) 12.53% ★★★★★☆ Arab National Bank (SASE:1080) 6.16% ★★★★★☆ Anadolu Isuzu Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret (IBSE:ASUZU) 3.07% ★★★★★★ Anadolu Hayat Emeklilik Anonim Sirketi (IBSE:ANHYT) 4.77% ★★★★★☆

Click here to see the full list of 57 stocks from our Top Middle Eastern Dividend Stocks screener.

Here we highlight a subset of our preferred stocks from the screener.

Emaar Properties PJSC

Simply Wall St Dividend Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Emaar Properties PJSC is involved in property investment, development, and management both in the United Arab Emirates and internationally, with a market capitalization of AED112.69 billion.

Operations: Emaar Properties PJSC generates revenue through its segments of Real Estate (AED39.55 billion), Leasing, Retail and Related Activities (AED7.68 billion), and Hospitality (AED2.33 billion).

Dividend Yield: 7.8%

Emaar Properties PJSC offers a compelling dividend yield of 7.84%, surpassing the AE market's top 25% threshold. Despite a volatile share price, its dividends are well-covered by earnings and cash flows, with payout ratios of 50.2% and 27.2%, respectively. However, dividend stability is a concern due to past volatility and unreliability over ten years. Recent financials show strong growth in net income to AED 17.60 billion for FY2025, supporting their AED 1 per share dividend proposal.

Delve into the full analysis dividend report here for a deeper understanding of Emaar Properties PJSC. In light of our recent valuation report, it seems possible that Emaar Properties PJSC is trading behind its estimated value.DFM:EMAAR Dividend History as at Mar 2026

Emirates NBD Bank PJSC

Simply Wall St Dividend Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Emirates NBD Bank PJSC, along with its subsidiaries, provides corporate, institutional, retail, treasury, and Islamic banking services and has a market cap of AED189.50 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: Emirates NBD Bank PJSC generates revenue from various segments including Retail Banking and Wealth Management (AED17.55 billion), Corporate and Institutional Banking (AED11.88 billion), Deniz Bank (AED11.30 billion), and Global Markets and Treasury (AED2.28 billion).

Dividend Yield: 3.3%

Emirates NBD Bank PJSC offers a stable dividend, supported by a low payout ratio of 26.9%, indicating dividends are well-covered by earnings. The bank's AED 1 per share dividend for FY2025 totals AED 6.32 billion, reflecting consistent payments over the past decade despite a volatile share price recently. Its Price-To-Earnings ratio of 8.1x suggests good relative value compared to the AE market average, though its dividend yield is lower than top-tier payers in the region.

Take a closer look at Emirates NBD Bank PJSC's potential here in our dividend report. Insights from our recent valuation report point to the potential undervaluation of Emirates NBD Bank PJSC shares in the market.DFM:EMIRATESNBD Dividend History as at Mar 2026

Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret

Simply Wall St Dividend Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. is a company that produces and sells roll papers both in Turkey and internationally, with a market capitalization of TRY20.57 billion.

Operations: Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. generates revenue from its Paper & Paper Products segment, amounting to TRY13.60 billion.

Dividend Yield: 4.4%

Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret offers a compelling dividend profile with a TRY 1.5255 per share annual dividend, reflecting strong earnings coverage and cash flow sustainability, as indicated by payout ratios of 52.8% and 44.6%, respectively. Despite recent revenue decline to TRY 13.60 billion, net income rose to TRY 1.70 billion, supporting reliable dividends in the top quartile of the TR market at a yield of 4.38%. However, its dividend history is relatively short at two years.

Get an in-depth perspective on Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret's performance by reading our dividend report here. The valuation report we've compiled suggests that Lila Kagit Sanayi Ve Ticaret's current price could be inflated.IBSE:LILAK Dividend History as at Mar 2026
